summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Product Detail Page and Image Upload features. All backend APIs working correctly (23/23 tests passed). Frontend features successfully implemented and functional.
passed_tests: Product detail page loads at /product/:id with full product information
Product cards are clickable links that navigate to detail pages
Add to cart button functions on detail page
Image upload endpoint POST /api/upload-image validates input correctly
File serve endpoint GET /api/files/{path} handles requests properly
Dashboard drag-and-drop image upload area is present and functional
Dashboard URL input fallback option works
Images display correctly across homepage, detail page, cart, and dashboard
Cart and order management work as expected

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (minor session timeout issues during extended testing, but all core functionality works)
